title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) rental assistance, including a Homeownership Voucher Program. Also offers a Family Self-Sufficiency program, Housing Rehab program, and manages several area affordable housing complexes for families, farmworkers, older adults, and people with special needs. 135 NE Dunn Place Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Varies; some programs may have residency or income requirements. Call for information. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-4300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 883-4300 Toll-free (888) 434-6571 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit the website for information. HVC vouchers are available by waitlist only, and the current waitlist time is 3-4 years. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Elderly/Disabled Home Rental Listings Government Subsidized Private Rental Housing Listings Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Home Rehabilitation Programs Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Low Cost Home Rental Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Agricultural Laborers Public Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Home Acquisition Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - YAMHILL REGIONAL HOUSING CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - READY TO RENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY
